components.name: CliParser
components.description: Clap argument parser defining 14 CLI commands, global flags (--format, -v), and shortcut flags (--run, --exec, --history). Produces `CliCommand` enum.

components.name: Dispatcher
components.description: Match parsed `CliCommand` to the appropriate handler — orchestrator (run/plan/cancel/status), engine service (history/explain/diff-plan/generate/template/audit/logs/config), or CLI-only (init/key/tui).

components.name: OrchestratorBuilder
components.description: Build and wire `OrchestratorService` with config + repo_root. Passes shared `CancellationToken` from signal handler. Used by `run`, `plan`, `cancel`, `status` commands.

components.name: ConfigLoader
components.description: Merge `rigorix.toml` + environment variables (`RIGORIX_*`) + CLI flags with priority ordering. Produces engine `Config`.

components.name: OutputFormatter
components.description: `LogFormatter` trait with four implementations — Pretty (human-readable with Unicode), JSON (CI/CD), Markdown (docs), Quiet (exit codes only). Drives all command output.

components.name: SignalHandler
components.description: Ctrl+C detection with two-level cancellation (single = graceful finish in-flight node, double within 2s = immediate abort). SIGTERM handling for Unix. Shares `CancellationToken` with orchestrator.

components.name: TracingInit
components.description: Initialize `tracing-subscriber` with `RIGORIX_LOG` env filter. Installed at startup before any command dispatch.

components.name: CliError
components.description: Error type mapping engine errors to CLI exit codes (0 success, 1 general error, 2 config error, 3 invalid args, 130 cancelled, 137 killed).
